Guided Tour
5 screens. Everything you need to know.

This is the actual HALU™ Command Centre. Real UI. Real data structure. See what your team would see from day one.

1

The Command Centre Dashboard

The first thing you see every morning. HALU™ has been running overnight — monitoring every department, cross-referencing data, flagging anything that needs attention. No chasing. No reports. Just clarity.

  • Revenue health score updated in real time
  • Active alerts ranked by business impact
  • Cross-department pipeline status at a glance
  • Your team's open action items — who owns what
HALU™ Command Centre — Dashboard
Revenue Health
74/100
⚠ 2 leaks detected
Active Alerts
7
3 need action today
Depts Connected
6
✓ All syncing
Sales pipeline stalled — 12 deals >21 days no contact
Sales · Flagged 2h ago · AED 340,000 at risk
URGENT
Finance approval bottleneck — 8 invoices >14 days
Finance · Flagged 5h ago · Cash flow impact
REVIEW
Marketing campaign ROI 3.2× — above target
Marketing · Updated 1h ago
ON TRACK
2

Cross-Department Intelligence Threads

HALU™ doesn't just monitor one department — it surfaces the connections between them. When sales is stalling because finance is slow, HALU™ sees it. When marketing spend isn't converting because ops is backlogged, HALU™ flags it.

  • Every department connected in one feed
  • HALU™ identifies cross-department blockers automatically
  • Full conversation thread per issue — full context, no back-and-forth
  • Escalates to the right person automatically
HALU™ — Intelligence Threads
S
Pipeline gap: Q2 target at risk — root cause identified
Sales × Finance × Ops · 3 departments involved
2h agoOPEN
M
Lead quality drop — attribution gap between CRM and ads
Marketing × Sales · Campaign spend vs conversion mismatch
4h agoREVIEW
O
Delivery SLA breach pattern — 3 clients flagged
Operations × Client Success · Escalation recommended
6h agoREVIEW
H
Resource allocation optimised — 2 team bottlenecks cleared
HR × Operations · Resolved automatically
YesterdayRESOLVED
3

Auto-Generated Action Items

HALU™ doesn't just identify problems — it tells you exactly what to do about them. Every alert generates a prioritised action item, assigned to the right person, with a clear deadline. No interpretation needed.

  • P1/P2/P3 priority ranking — based on revenue impact
  • Assigned to specific team members automatically
  • Deadline set based on urgency and business context
  • Status tracked — HALU™ follows up if overdue
HALU™ — Action Items
Contact 12 stalled deals — personalised follow-up sequence
→ Sarah (Sales Lead) · Due today · AED 340K at risk
P1 · TODAY
Escalate 3 overdue invoices to Finance Director
→ Ahmed (Finance) · Due today · Cash flow impact
P1 · TODAY
Review lead attribution — align CRM tags with ad campaigns
→ Marketing team · Due this week
P2 · THIS WEEK
Client SLA review — update delivery timelines for 3 accounts
→ Client Success · Due this week
P2 · THIS WEEK
Resource reallocation — move 2 FTEs from backlog project
→ Operations · Due next week
P3 · NEXT WEEK
4

Zonar Metrics — Business Health Over Time

HALU™ tracks your business health score across every dimension — revenue, operations, people, and growth. You see the trend over time, not just a snapshot. It's the difference between reacting and leading.

  • Revenue health tracked week-over-week
  • Operational efficiency score — rising or falling
  • People & capacity — burnout risk flagged early
  • Growth pipeline score — momentum indicator
HALU™ — Zonar Metrics
Revenue Health
74 / 100 ▼ -3 this week
Operational Efficiency
81 / 100 ▲ +5 this week
People & Capacity
68 / 100 ⚠ Monitor
Growth Pipeline
88 / 100 ▲ Strong
HALU™ WEEKLY INSIGHT
Revenue health dipped this week due to sales pipeline stall. Growth pipeline is strong — convert the 12 stalled deals and you recover 8+ points. Recommend P1 action today.
5

Ask HALU™ Anything

HALU™ isn't just a dashboard — it's a conversational agent. Ask it why revenue dipped last week. Ask it which client is most at risk of churn. Ask it what your team should focus on today. It knows your entire business.

  • Natural language — no training needed
  • Answers grounded in your actual data
  • Proactively surfaces what you didn't think to ask
  • Available 24/7 — your always-on business analyst
HALU™ Agent
You
Why is our revenue health score down this week?
H
Your revenue health dropped 3 points this week. The primary cause is 12 deals in Sales that have had no contact in 21+ days — these represent AED 340,000 in potential revenue. Secondary factor: 8 invoices stuck in Finance approval are creating a cash flow lag. I've generated P1 action items for both. Want me to draft the follow-up sequence for the stalled deals?
You
Yes please
HALU™ is drafting 12 personalised follow-up emails...

What happens in your first 48 hours

From signup to first revenue insight — here's the exact sequence.

1

Hour 1 — Onboarding call

30-minute setup call. We connect your existing tools — CRM, finance, ops.

2

Hour 4 — First sync

HALU™ ingests your data and runs its first cross-department analysis.

3

Hour 24 — First alerts

Your first revenue leak flagged. Your first action items generated.

4

Hour 48 — First insight report

HALU™ delivers your first weekly business health summary. Your team has a baseline.

Ready to see it with your own data?

Access the live HALU™ sandbox — pre-loaded with demo data so you can explore every screen yourself. No sales call required.

Takes 60 seconds to register. Sandbox access is immediate.
